meta.title: SkinSwipe – Trade CS2 Skins | Free P2P Skin Trading
meta.description: Trade CS2 skins without fees. Find the perfect trade with the Tinder principle – swipe, match, trade.

home.hero_desc: The first Tinder for CS2 Skins. Swipe, match, trade — directly with real players. No Steam Tax. No Bots. No Fees.
home.cta_desc: Login for free and start swiping right away.

steps.title: Steam Login
steps.desc: Log in with your Steam account — one click, done.

steps.title: List Skins
steps.desc: Choose which skins from your inventory you want to trade.

steps.title: Swipe
steps.desc: Right for skins you want. Left for skins you don't.

steps.title: Match & Trade
steps.desc: Mutual match — complete the trade directly via Steam.
